title: Sally's Cozy and Lively Neighborhood
passage:
I'm Sally. My grandparents live in a nice neighborhood. It's an interesting place to visit. I like to spend time there on weekends. I often walk along Main Street to get there.

There is an old building in the center of the neighborhood. It's a library. It's about 150 years old and lots of people like to read books there. There is a red building across from the library. It's an old post office. It's about 100 years old. Next to it, there is a supermarket.

My favorite place in the neighborhood is Walking Street. There are many small restaurants on this street. I like to eat all kinds of delicious snacks. There is a park behind Walking Street. My grandparents always walk around in the park every afternoon. It's nice and quiet, and they can enjoy the clean air and sunshine.

questions.prompt: When does Sally spend time in her grandparents' home?

options: In the center of the neighborhood.

questions.prompt: What's Sally's favorite place in the neighborhood?
What do you think of Sally's grandparents' daily lives? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I think her grandparents have a very healthy and peaceful life.
Because they can enjoy fresh air and warm sunshine while walking in the park every afternoon.
It is a perfect way for them to keep fit and relax in their old age.
Sally often walks along Main Street on weekends.
The library is about 150 years old.
There are many small restaurants on Walking Street.
